title: atragene alpina f. ochotensis
intro: Atragene alpina f. ochotensis, also known as Siberian coltsfoot, is a plant species that belongs to the saxifragaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and lance-shaped leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Atragene alpina f. ochotensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be made by drying and processing its leaves and flowers, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
